name: PER_EMPL_OFFER_HR_TRACK
description: This table stores the value of the offer assignment id along with the action's performed on this table and the resulatant assignment id's generated due to the action.

columns.Name: OFFER_HR_TRACK_ID
columns.Comments: OFFER_HR_TRACK_ID is the primary key of the table. Based on this we can get the details of the offer record.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This fieldis used to store the person id detailsalong with the assigment id details

columns.Name: OFFER_ASG_ID
columns.Comments: This particular field will store the detailsof the only assignment id generated while creating the offer.

columns.Name: PWK_ASG_ID
columns.Comments: This columnb stores the pwk assignment id whihc gets created while converting the offer to a pwk or creating the pwndingworker

columns.Name: EMP_CWK_ASG_ID
columns.Comments: This column will have the detaiuls of the either empassignment id or pwk assignment id. Which got created while converting the pwk

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCES_ID
columns.Comments: Action occurrence id generated whilemaking the changes to the assignment record either offer or pwk

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: the string form of the action type code which describes the action code in text

columns.Name: GLB_TRFR_ASG_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds the assignment id details generated while performing global transfer .i.e; creating the global transfer work relationship

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: INCUMBENT_VALIDATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts value of Y or N. If set to Y, then consider the offer assignment for incumbent validation.

columns.Name: POSITION_SYNCHRONIZATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts value of Y or N. If set to Y, then consider the offer assignment for synchronization from position.

columns.Name: PREV_ACTION_OCCURRENCES_ID
columns.Comments: To store the previous Action occurrence id for the present offer assignment record.

columns.Name: CONVERSION_STATUS
columns.Comments: To store the status of offer assignment record.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: To store the Transaction_id of HRC_TXN_HEADER
